official_application_entrypoint_rule: Official entrypoints are inspectable URL candidates, not proof that a concrete role is currently open. Runtime subagents must verify current JD/public JD URLs before apply-now or role-specific tailoring.
status: seed database with expanded public source links; not a complete evidence corpus
highest_confidence_rule: Official JD / official career page / official campus page / verified HR public post outrank recruitment platforms, candidate posts, and anonymous social media.
role_specific_rule: For any concrete target role, run fresh JD analysis on the user device.
